options.name: --help

Prints help information
--debug
--api-key      Your houston1 API key

options.name: --help
options.description:
Prints help information
--debug

options.name: --api-token
options.description: Your houston2 API token

options.name: --cluster-config-zone
options.description:
Cluster config zone for Api.Server connect.
Default: default
--application              Application id or full name
(<team>/<project>/<subproject>/<application>)

options.name: --version
options.description:
Version of release
--previous-version         Previous version of release. Default: empty

options.name: --environment
options.description: Target environment id or name

options.name: --strategy
options.description:
Deploy strategy. Possible values: recreate,
rolling-update. Default: rolling update

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
Deploy timeout (like '30 seconds'). Default
is 30 minutes
--dont-fail-on-rollback    Don't throw exception if deploy has been
roll-backed
--dont-fail-on-suspend     Don't throw exception if deploy has been
suspended
--created                  Group deployment created by

options.name: --cluster-config-zone
options.description:

options.name: --instance
options.description:
Instance identifier (a guid obtained from the
web interface or
team/proj/subproj/app/env/instance name
sequence)

options.name: --command
options.description:
Command to execute. If omitted, starts a
pseudo-interactive session

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
Command execution timeout (like '30 seconds').
Default is 1 minute

options.description:
Prints help information
--debug

options.name: --name
options.description: New project name

options.name: --package-manager
options.description:
Package manager: cement, nuget. By default auto
detected

options.name: --framework
options.description: Framework

arguments.name: TEMPLATE
arguments.description: Template name. List templates by 'new ls' command
